scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,green "npm run dev --workspace @psikotest/web" "npm run dev --workspace @psikotest/api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @psikotest/shared && npm run build --workspace @psikotest/api && npm run build --workspace @psikotest/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @psikotest/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @psikotest/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @psikotest/web
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run build
